title: whiptail
html:
whiptail

File Read

The file is shown in an interactive TUI dialog made for displaying text, arrows can be used to scroll long content.

whiptail --textbox --scrolltext /path/to/input-file 0 0
excerpt: whiptail File Read The file is shown in an interactive TUI dialog made for displaying text, arrows can be used to scroll long content. whiptail --textbox --scrolltext /path/to/input-file 0 0
